_description: Roamera design tokens — extracted from Waves & WiFi concept (index.html + homepage.html). These are the CANONICAL colors for the brand.

coral.usage: Primary brand color. CTAs, links, active states, hover accents, logo dot, section nav active state. The warm, inviting action color.

sage.usage: Secondary accent. Tags, badges, sustainability section, host avatar backgrounds. Natural and calming.

charcoal.usage: Primary text color. Headings, body text, footer background, room price badges. NOT pure black — warm dark gray.

cream.usage: Community tags background, warm accent backgrounds. Feels cozy and inviting.

sand.usage: Page background on homepage. Warm, soft off-white. NOT cool gray.

star.usage: Star ratings ONLY. Never use for other UI elements.

neutrals._note: These are WARM grays (stone family), NOT cool grays. This is intentional — the entire palette is warm.

shadows._note: Shadows are subtle and warm. Never use harsh black shadows.

rules: ALL grays are warm (stone family) — never use cool/blue grays
Primary action color is ALWAYS coral (#E07A5F) — buttons, links, active nav
Secondary badges/tags use sage (#81B29A) or sage-light (#e8f4ee)
Page backgrounds: gray-50 (#fafaf9) for listing pages, sand (#FDF6EC) for homepage
Card backgrounds: white (#fff) with 1px border gray-200
Text hierarchy: charcoal (primary) → gray-600 (secondary) → gray-500 (tertiary) → gray-400 (caption/meta)
Star ratings: ONLY #F4A261 — never coral, never yellow
Footer: charcoal background with white/60% opacity text
Hover states: coral-hover (#c96a50) for buttons, gray-100 for secondary
Borders: always gray-200 (#e7e5e4), never darker except on hover
